title: The Challenger at Dawn
description: A young warrior recognizes your crest and challenges you before a gathering crowd. They seek honor, but their trembling hands reveal how much they have to lose.

options.title: Accept with Honor
options.description: Fight fairly and teach through restraint rather than humiliation.

options.title: Demand a Wager
options.description: A public challenge should carry a worthwhile prize.

options.title: Refuse the Spectacle
options.description: Honor is not proven by answering every demand for violence.
